jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Myntra
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Myntra. We are on the lookout for a dedicated SEO Specialist to strengthen our Kochi-based team.

About Myntra:
Myntra is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Myntra!
